Instruction_Text: data/live/ is a controlled drop-zone for operator-onboarded live data.
Do not commit live datasets to git.
Add/update corresponding [[files]] entry in data/manifest/data_manifest.toml under approved change control.
Populate hash_sha256, approved_by, and approved_date prior to ingestion.
Create/maintain dataset lineage record in data/lineage/.
If SHA-256 verification fails at preflight, halt run and escalate per operations procedure.
Enforcement_Action: halt run and escalate per operations procedure
